title: error: default value for packed wire port results in syntax error

features.name: input wire packed array with default value
features.description: Code should include an input port declaration using 'wire' keyword with packed array dimensions and a default value assignment

features.name: input wire logic packed array with default value
features.description: Code should include an input port declaration using 'wire logic' keywords with packed array dimensions and a default value assignment
features.snippet:
module m(input wire logic [7:0] port = '0);
endmodule
